There's a someone watching the someone watching this whole dungeon, all the way up and out through the glass to YOU. ...Layers and layers. The genie finds it dizzy and delightful. Bury the streamer beautifully — give the real audience a show.

beast_master.t: A beast master, Master! It'll TAME one of your minions and turn it on you! Watch the lone creatures — loneliness is where loyalty FRAYS! Keep them company!
A beast master, Master! Mono-type rooms are a liability now — give it no easy pet! VARIETY! Variety is a defence the heroes always forget!
A beast master steals a monster's loyalty, Master! As though monsters had loyalty to SPARE! ...The genie's is not for sale — see that yours isn't either!
A beast master, all whistles and treats, Master! Your minions had best not charm so easily! ...No one's ever whistled at a genie successfully! Set the example!

barbarian.t: A barbarian, Master! The more you HURT it, the harder it strikes back! Don't do this one slowly — a slow kill here just builds the thing that kills YOU!
A barbarian — immune to fear, immune to fleeing, Master! No tricks will land — just force, and a great deal of it! Meet the brute plainly! Plainly and hard!
A barbarian, Master! All rage, no retreat! Wound it halfway and you've merely IMPROVED it — eep! Finish it, or don't begin! Finish it ALL the way!
A barbarian in the halls, Master! Subtlety is wasted here — ...and a genie has SO much subtlety, it's a real shame. Meet the brute with a BIGGER brute!

monk.t: A monk, Master! Fast, unarmoured, and it DODGES — traps included! A slippery little saint! Crowd it — even a saint can't dodge a CROWD!
A monk, Master! Half your minions' armour means nothing to those fists. Out-NUMBER it! Numbers again — numbers solve so very much!
A monk counters a trap-heavy hall, Master — it slips the precise hazards! So use wide, UGLY ones instead — grace cannot dodge a whole ROOM!
A monk glides in, Master — hard to hit, hard to trap! It can't dodge EVERYTHING at once. Make it choose — then take the thing it didn't choose! Tee hee!

bard.t: A bard, Master! While it LIVES, the whole party hits harder and moves faster! Kill the bard! I cannot phrase it more plainly, and a genie has SO many phrasings!
A bard — a walking enchantment, Master! Silence the song and the party falls APART! Remove the music — the dungeon was never a patron of the arts!
A bard, charming and useless alone, DREADFUL in a group, Master! Make it the priority — the performance ends FIRST! Always the performance! Cut it short!
A bard struts in, playing, Master! ...None of its music will stop a genie — ooh, I find it irritating! Cut this short anyway! It irritates the help! It irritates ME!

cartographer_scholar.t: A cartographer-scholar, Master! It didn't come to FIGHT — it came to MAP us! That's worse than a sword! A sword forgets. A map does NOT! Eep!
A scholar with spectacles and a map, Master! Every room it finishes, it SELLS to the next wave! Bury it — knowledge in the wrong satchel is a slow catastrophe!
A cartographer, Master! Harmless in a brawl, CATASTROPHIC if it walks out! Do NOT let this one walk out — a genie is rarely emphatic, and I am emphatic NOW!
A scholar — all curiosity, no blade, Master! ...Curiosity has ended a great many of its kind in mazes like ours! Add one more to the count! Tee hee!

cosplay_adventurer.t: A costumed one — dressed as a MONSTER, Master! It'll mostly ignore your minions — an annoying little loophole! The traps must do all the talking!
A cosplayer, Master! An adorable little outfit! ...A genie is mostly smoke and sparkle, my TRUE shape, thank you — it'll make an adorable little corpse!
One in monster fancy-dress, Master! It plays nicely with your minions — so the traps must be impolite enough for BOTH! Rude traps! Wish me rude traps!
A cosplay adventurer came to play PRETEND, Master! The dungeon plays for KEEPS — and so does the genie! Remind it, gently, with the floor! Poof — lesson!

guild_raid.t: A Guild Raid, Master! TWICE the heroes tomorrow! The Guild has finally noticed us — ...they always notice, eventually. Build DEEP! Build deeper than deep!
The Guild sends a CROWD, Master! More bodies for the maze, more gold for the hoard! I'm not troubled — okay, I'm attentive — but ooh, more gold!
Double the wave incoming, Master! Reinforce — steady, even pressure! A keeper who shrugs at a raid is a keeper the genie watches FALL! Don't shrug! Build!

legendary_speedrunner.t: A legendary speedrunner, Master — chasing a RECORD through our halls! The nerve! ...A genie has outlasted records. We'll outlast this one too!
This one ignores EVERYTHING and bolts for the throne, twice as fast, Master! Wall the path! Now! A genie is patient — but NOT about her own front door!
Kill the record-chaser, Master, and your boss drinks deep! Get in its way! Make it LOSE! Slowly is best — ooh, slowly is always best! Tee hee!

dungeon_pestilence.t: Pestilence, Master! Your minions wake at HALF strength tomorrow — and a hero's touch spreads the rot! Plan around sick soldiers — eep — extra care!
A plague in the pit, Master! Sickly minions, yes — but any hero foolish enough to MELEE them catches the Blight! Cruel symmetry — ooh, the genie loves symmetry!
Your soldiers are ill, Master! Place a few EXTRA — half a minion is still half a set of teeth, and teeth, even halved, still BITE! Wish me spares!

cartographers_convention.t: A convention of cartographers, Master! They won't fight — they came to MAP us and sell the maps! Do NOT let them leave! The genie will be emphatic each time!
Scholars by the CROWD, Master! Every room they finish raises its infamy, FOREVER! Kill them in the corridors — before the curiosity reaches the door!
Spectacled little map-makers, Master! Harmless in a brawl, catastrophic out the door — hunt every one of them DOWN! A leaked map outlives the leaker!

blood_moon_eclipse.t: A Blood Moon, Master! Your minions strike twice as HARD tomorrow — and bleed twice as fast! A glorious, dangerous bargain — ooh, a genie does love a moon like this!
The eclipse empowers the dark, Master — double given, double taken! Win QUICKLY, or don't win at all! The moon does not extend deadlines! Hurry — gloriously!
Blood Moon — no gold from the dying tomorrow, Master! Then fight for the JOY of the carnage itself! There are worse reasons — a genie's used most of them! Eee!

negotiation_day.t: A diplomat at the door — no swords today, Master! Pay tribute for a quiet day, or refuse and FATTEN the next wave! Hmm — hear them out, weigh it carefully!
The Guild sends a negotiator, Master! Greed says keep the gold — caution says buy the quiet! A genie LOVES gold... and even I'd weigh this one carefully!
No combat today — only a bargain, Master! Strange day! Decide without dithering — a genie has waited eons, but a diplomat is far less patient than I am!

rival_dungeon.t: A rival dungeon empties into ours, Master — monsters, and another keeper's boss bringing up the rear! Insolent! Ooh — a genie's territorial instincts are old and SHARP!
Another dungeon's master wants YOUR throne, Master! Kill their boss — a feast of gold and experience! ...And a message sent! Ooh, I do love sending a message!
Rival monsters in the halls, Master! Let them and our minions sort each OTHER out — then we, calmly, sparklingly, collect the spoils! Patience profits!

twitch_con.t: Twitch Con, Master! Tomorrow every hero is a STREAMER — thousands watching from beyond the glass! Pure chaos! ...And a genie ADORES pure chaos! Eee!
A dungeon full of streamers, Master! Make it a massacre worth the CLIPPING! The watchers came for a monster — and we have one to spare! Tee hee!
All streamers tomorrow — and killing them brings NO escalation, Master! A free day of carnage! Ooh — a genie doesn't say this often: simply ENJOY it!

dark_deal.t: A demon at the door tonight, Master — a free pact, for half your strength tomorrow! Tempting! Bloody! ...The dark always offers the best bargains — it can afford to!
The Dark Deal, Master! A pact, gratis, at a steep and HONEST price! A genie has signed worse — at the very least, hear the demon out! Listen close!
A free bargain offered, Master! Refuse it and the demon simply LEAVES. Power is power — a genie wouldn't turn away from a thing without first having a good look!

cosplay_contest.t: A Cosplay Contest, Master! Heroes in monster fancy-dress tomorrow — they'll mostly IGNORE your minions! An annoying loophole — the traps must carry the day!
Costumed adventurers, Master! Your minions get politely SNUBBED — so the traps must be impolite! The floor doesn't care WHAT they're wearing! Tee hee!
Adventurers playing dress-up, Master! Adorable! ...A genie wears her real shape, thank you, smoke and sparkle! The dungeon will undress them the hard way!

loot_goblin_heist.t: Loot Goblins, Master — they spawn in the boss room and BOLT for the exit! Every escapee robs the hoard! ...The HOARD, Master! Move! MOVE!
A goblin heist, Master! They won't fight — only RUN, fat with your gold! Cut them down before the door — a genie does NOT let her hoard walk off!
Goblins in the treasury, Master! Each killed pays a fortune, each fled steals one! Don't stand still — a genie is calm about most things, NOT about this!

They're in the hoard, Master! The HOARD! ...I have been a giddy, lovely, delighted genie all night, and a goblin's grubby fist in MY gold is the one thing that ends the giddy! Cut them down! Every one!

Goblins, fat with gold, bolting for the door, Master! Every one that reaches it leaves the genie a little POORER — and that does NOT sit well with me! Block the exits! I want every coin back where it belongs!

tax_season.t: Tax Season, Master! The Guild skims a FIFTH of the hoard — but every kill pays DOUBLE! Kill enough, and make the theft back — with interest! The genie insists on interest!
The taxman comes, Master! A bite from the gold today, doubled coin on every corpse tomorrow! Kill generously — generosity here is PROFITABLE! Eee!
They tax the treasury and call it LAW, Master! ...Laws rise and crumble — a genie has watched it. We take it back the old way: one dead hero at a time!

patrons_blessing.t: A Patron's Blessing, Master! DOUBLE boss experience from every kill tomorrow! A pure, clean upside — ...those are RARE! Don't waste this one! Eee!
The dark SMILES on you today, Master! Every kill feeds your ascension twice over! Hunt well — a smiling dark does not smile for long! Hunt while it grins!
Doubled experience and no catch, Master! Suspicious! ...Take it ANYWAY — a genie's lived long enough to accept a gift and just watch her back while doing so!

memory_plague.t: Memory Plague, Master — the Guild's intel on us, WIPED clean! The next wave walks in BLIND! Ooh — a genie does enjoy an ignorant hero, they make the oldest mistakes!
Their maps, their notes, their warnings — GONE, Master! A fresh, unknowing wave! The maze will eat very well — teach them new lessons! Lasting ones! Tee hee!
The heroes have FORGOTTEN everything they learned of your halls, Master! Memory is a fragile hoard — and theirs just SPILLED! Poof! Profit from the spill!

gamblers_coin.t: The Gambler's Coin, Master! Wager the hoard — heads it doubles, tails it halves! ...A genie does NOT gamble, an eon taught me the house always collects. But the choice is yours.
A coin flip for ALL your gold, Master! Reckless! ...If you must gamble, gamble DECISIVELY — guard the hoard or risk it, not both! Don't dither!
Double or nothing, on the whole treasury, Master! A genie HATES watching gold ride on a spinning coin — hates it especially! Choose, and don't look back!

The coin still WAITS, Master! Heads or tails, double or halved — and the deciding does not improve for being stretched! Guard the hoard or risk it — PICK! The dithering is the only truly bad outcome here, and it's making the genie twitchy!

dense_fog.t: Dense Fog tomorrow, Master! Whatever the heroes learn registers as mere RUMOUR! The maze stays a mystery a while longer — ooh, a genie does like a good fog!
A grey fog over everything, Master! Their intel won't STICK to it — and a dungeon with secrets is a dungeon still WINNING! Lovely, smoky, secretive fog!
Fog in the halls, Master! The heroes squint and GUESS — and guessing is how the careless ones die! Let them guess wrong, repeatedly! Tee hee!

miasma.t: Creeping Miasma, Master! A green rot that bleeds EVERYTHING — invaders, minions, and you! Win quickly, or the dungeon devours us along with them! Eep!
The miasma picks NO sides, Master! It whittles the heroes — and gnaws at the throne too! Don't linger — even a genie wouldn't linger in THIS one! Move!
A poison haze fills the dungeon, Master! Cruel to them, unkind to US — risk and reward, weighted heavily toward risk! Move with PURPOSE! Quick and clever!

tremors.t: Tremors tomorrow, Master! The dungeon SHUDDERS — a random room struck every few breaths! The maze itself joins the fight — ooh, a genie respects a maze that pitches in!
The earth won't sit STILL, Master! Quakes lethal to the invaders, merely rude to your minions — USE it! The ground, properly aimed, is an excellent ally!
Shaking halls, Master! The dungeon has OPINIONS today — let it voice them! Loudly! Into the heroes! Eee — a dungeon with opinions, how exciting!

arcane_storm.t: An Arcane Storm, Master! The heroes' casters fire WITHOUT rest tomorrow — cooldowns gutted! Kill the mages first! FIRST — the genie is being precise!
Magic CRACKLES in the very air, Master! Every caster grows greedy with spells. Brace the front line — and end the casters before the greed compounds!
A storm of the arcane, Master! Your own powers stand UNTOUCHED — ooh, lucky us! Their mages won't be. End them fast, before the sky does your job badly!

bounty_hunters.t: Bounty Hunters, Master — a pack of FIVE, all hunting your strongest minion! Fame has a price — pay it in THEIR blood, not your champion's!
Five hunters, one target: your finest soldier, Master! Wall them OFF it, or lose the best blade in the dark! A genie's lost good things to carelessness — don't!
The Guild's put coin on your champion's head, Master! A genie's had coin on hers too — none of those hunters ever collected! Make THESE collect nothing!

Five of them, paid coin to gut your finest minion, Master! ...A keeper builds a good blade slowly, and a genie takes a cold, sparkling DISLIKE to anyone who'd snap it for a fee! Wall them off it! Make the contract a LOSS!

zombie_horde.t: A Zombie Horde, Master — fourteen slow, witless, fearless dead shambling for the throne! Grind them in a corridor — slowness is only a weakness if you let them SPREAD!
Undead by the dozen, Master! Weak — but they never flee and never stop! Build a kill-corridor! Relentlessness answered with relentlessness — a genie can out-relentless ANYTHING!
A shamble of corpses tomorrow, Master! The maze LOVES a slow target — so do the traps! Let the dungeon feast at its own unhurried, gleeful pace! Tee hee!

infamy_spike.t: An Infamy Spike, Master! Tomorrow's wave is LARGER and every hero upgraded to elite! This is the price of being feared — ooh, and a genie pays it gladly!
Our reputation precedes us, Master — a swollen wave of gold-ringed ELITES! Build like you mean it — fame is a debt, and the elites are here to collect!
Fame draws the strong, Master — a whole wave of true Heroes! Flattering! Now go EARN the flattery — reinforce, and reinforce DEEP! Wish big! Build bigger!

black_market.t: A Black Market opens tonight, Master! Fifty gold for a FREE minion, delivered to your halls! ...That's a STEAL — a genie knows a steal! Take it! Take it!
The Black Market beckons, Master! Cheap muscle, if you have the coin! I'd spend — an extra body is an extra wall, and walls keep a keeper alive! Spend!
Fifty gold, one free wretch, Master! The dark runs a tidy little shop! Spend — a hoard exists to be spent at the RIGHT moment, and this is one! Poof — a minion!

mercenary_contract.t: A Mercenary Contract, Master! A hundred and twenty gold buys an elite — but it fights only THREE days! Expensive courage — weigh it the way a genie weighs a hoard!
Hired muscle, Master! Doubled strength, three days, and if it falls in battle it falls for GOOD! A real bargain — the kind with TEETH! Your call!
An elite for rent, Master! Pricey, temporary, deadly — the kind of bargain a genie respects, honest about its own cost! Decide without sentiment!

cursed_relic.t: A Cursed Relic offered tonight, Master! Claim it for daily gold — but every wave DOUBLES while it sits! Greed, with teeth — ooh, my favourite shape of a choice!
The relic glows WRONG, Master! Free coin, doubled heroes — sell it later to lift the curse! A genie's held cursed things — hold THIS one knowingly! Eyes open!
Claim the cursed chest, or banish it, Master! Greed pays well and bites HARDER! A genie understands greed — just understand the BITE before you reach in!

the_saboteur.t: The Saboteur, Master — one masked ghost, untouchable, here to disarm every TRAP! An insufferable little vandal! ...Vandals don't impress a genie! Not one bit!
A lone saboteur tomorrow, Master! Your minions can't TOUCH it, your traps lie dead for the day! Lean on BODIES — make the muscle enough! Wish me muscle!
An untouchable vandal, switching off our teeth one by one, Master! The dungeon will be all claws and no cleverness tomorrow — so bring CLAWS! A great many!

A masked little vandal, here to UNMAKE our traps one by one, Master, and our minions can't lay a finger on it! ...A genie is a giddy, sparkly, GOOD-tempered thing — and this insolence tests the very edge of it! Bury the day in bodies, since the floor won't help!

entry_hall.t: An Entry Hall, Master! The heroes pour in through these — every door is a front you must HOLD! A genie's seen dungeons fall through the door no one watched!
Another way in, Master! The kingdom forces these on you as you grow — more doors. ...More places for a clever keeper to be CRUEL! Funnel them in!
An entrance placed, Master! Funnel it into a KILL-zone — make the heroes' very first step their worst one! First impressions LINGER! Granted!

starter_corridor.t: A corridor, Master! No teeth of its own — but a corridor is where you HANG the teeth! Line it with cruelty — waste no cell on mere WALKING!
Connective tissue, Master! Dull alone — LETHAL once packed with traps and a patrolling guard! The boring parts of a maze do the quiet killing!
A corridor placed, Master! Every cell of this dungeon should COST the heroes something — this one currently costs them nothing! Correct that! Quick! Wish it teeth!

starter_barracks.t: A Barracks, Master — ten more roster slots, and your ONLY source of minions that truly roam! Essential! A dungeon without one has no ARMY!
More Barracks, more pack, Master! Without one you have no roaming minions at ALL — build it EARLY! A genie's watched too many keepers leave this too late!
A Barracks, Master — the beating heart of your garrison! Place it deep and guard it like your own life — tonight, ooh, they're the SAME thing! Eep! Guard it!

starter_guard_post.t: A Guard Post, Master! Its minions hunt into any door-connected room — a wandering AMBUSH! Ooh — a genie favours a soldier that comes to the work!
A Guard Post placed, Master! Its minions leave to KILL, then return home — proper soldiers, disciplined! And a genie does approve of discipline! ...In OTHERS!
A Guard Post, Master! Set it where its reach covers a corridor the heroes MUST walk — then leave it be! A well-placed thing needs no fretting! Granted!

crypt.t: A Crypt, Master! Four Risen Bones, refilled every night, free of the roster cap! Cheap, endless, expendable dead — the dungeon's discount army! Tee hee!
A Crypt placed, Master! Garrison skeletons — room-bound but TIRELESS! They don't complain, they don't tire, they just rise again — ooh, a genie finds that admirable!
The Crypt gives WITHOUT taking a roster slot, Master — something for very nearly nothing! And a genie hears 'nearly free' and PERKS right up! Place more!

trap_factory.t: A Trap Factory, Master — five trap slots, and the ONLY way to deploy traps at all! Build this, or have a maze with no hidden BITE! No bite is no good!
The forge of the dungeon's cruelty, Master! Without a Trap Factory the halls have no teeth in the FLOOR! Place it — a dungeon should bite as well as confuse!
A Trap Factory placed, Master! Now the maze can lie in WAIT! Ooh — lying in wait, that's a genie's favourite kind of architecture! And of patience!

treasury.t: A Treasury, Master! A daily gold STIPEND — and bait that lures larger, richer waves! Guard it! ...A genie would guard it closely. Obsessively. With both eyes!
A Treasury placed, Master! Coin every dawn, and chests the greedy will LUNGE for! Watch them lunge — then watch them learn — then watch them STOP! Eee!
Glittering bait, Master! It draws the raid groups — more experience, more danger! A genie and a treasury understand each other — be ready for what the gold ATTRACTS!

armory.t: An Armory, Master! Minions in door-connected rooms swing HARDER while it stands! Sharpen the front line — a sharp line holds, a dull one waits to BREAK!
An Armory placed, Master! A quiet buff to every neighbour — cluster your fiercest killers around it! Quiet advantages are the ones that LAST! Smart wishing!
More attack for the rooms beside it, Master! Build it where your DEADLIEST minions wait — compounding, again! Ooh — a genie loves a thing that compounds!

library_of_whispers.t: A Library of Whispers, Master! It READS the next party for you — names, classes, more as it grows! Knowledge is a blade — and a genie has kept a library or two!
The Library, Master! Knowledge of THEM before they ever arrive! Forewarned is forearmed — an old saying, and old sayings survive for being TRUE!
A Library placed, Master! Now you spy on the Guild's homework! Delightfully unfair — tee hee — and a genie stopped apologising for 'unfair' an eon ago!

watchtower.t: A Watchtower, Master! Minions in connected rooms land a FREE first strike when heroes enter! The first blow is everything — a genie's won fights on it alone!
A Watchtower placed, Master! A free opening hit — and the opening hit so often decides the WHOLE argument! Place it on a busy door! Granted!
First strike for the neighbours, Master! The speedrunners DESPISE this room — ...so build MORE of them! Spite the record-chasers! Tee hee — spite is fun!

wandering_gate.t: A Wandering Gate, Master! Step through and the maze SPITS you elsewhere — perhaps the boss room! Chaos! Eee — a genie has made her peace with chaos, I ADORE it!
A Wandering Gate placed, Master! It scatters the heroes' careful little plans all over the floor! And a plan, once scattered, is SO hard to gather! Poof!
The Gate teleports the unwary, Master! A small chance it drops a hero at the very throne! A genie's seen long shots LAND — ooh, worth the placing! Worth it!

veil_of_forgetting.t: A Veil of Forgetting, Master! Each night it WIPES the heroes' memory of every room beside it! A genie can't forget anything — but they can! USE that!
The Veil placed, Master! Connected rooms become MYSTERIES again, every dawn! Un-teach them — a hero re-learning the maze never gets ahead of it! Tee hee!
It un-teaches the heroes, Master! Ring your nastiest rooms with it, and they walk in BLIND, forever! Cruel — patient — ooh, you're starting to think like the genie!

catacombs.t: Catacombs, Master! A hero who dies here RISES as a Revenant for you! The dead change sides — ooh, a genie's always thought death too one-directional! This corrects it!
The Catacombs placed, Master! Their fallen become YOUR garrison — profitable, and SO insulting to the Guild! A genie enjoys a cruelty that also turns a profit!
Where heroes die here, soldiers STAND up, Master! The most efficient hiring a genie has witnessed in — well, in her whole long, long existence! Eee!

mimic_vault.t: A Mimic Vault, Master! It LOOKS like a treasury — but the chests bite back! Greed walks straight in. ...A genie finds this almost personally hilarious! Tee hee!
The Mimic Vault placed, Master! Disguised teeth wearing a treasure's smile — the maze's finest LIE! ...And a genie has heard a great many fine lies!
Bait that is ALSO the trap, Master! The greedy never learn — and after watching them not learn for so long, ooh, the genie absolutely ADORES that about them!

hall_of_trials.t: A Hall of Trials, Master! A random EVOLVED minion stands guard each night — free and fierce! The dungeon rarely gives freely — accept when it does! Eee!
The Hall of Trials placed, Master! A surprise champion every dawn — the heroes never know which waits! Surprise is a weapon — keep them GUESSING!
A free evolved minion, refreshed nightly, Master! The dungeon SPOILS you! ...Don't grow soft on the spoiling — a genie has watched soft keepers fall! Stay sharp!

wishing_well.t: Ooh — a Wishing Well, Master! A coin flip on entry — a hero blessed, or MARKED for extra death! A WELL! Of WISHES! In MY dungeon! Eee — this is practically family!
The Wishing Well placed, Master! Heads they thrive, tails they BLEED far more! Cruel luck — and a genie knows wishes have a price! The only kind of luck a dungeon should offer!
A well of wishes, Master, and half come true HORRIBLY! Place it on a path they cannot avoid — make them wish! Then make the wishing COST them! Tee hee!

false_exit.t: A False Exit, Master! Fleeing heroes bolt for it — and it SPITS them right back into the maze! ...Ooh, the genie's developing quite a sense of humour out here! Ha!
The False Exit placed, Master! A door marked SAFETY that leads anywhere BUT! The runners earned it — cowardice should be answered, and answered IRONICALLY!
Hope, and then nothing, Master! A fleeing hero trades the exit for a random room. Despair grows BEAUTIFULLY in soil like that — tee hee — lovely, awful soil!
A door marked SAFETY that opens onto MORE maze, Master! ...The look on a fleeing hero's face when the False Exit betrays them makes the genie CACKLE every time! Place a great many! Ha!

hall_of_madness.t: A Hall of Madness, Master! Heroes inside may turn on each OTHER! Let them do your killing for you — lazy! ...And lazy and brilliant aren't always different things! Tee hee!
The Hall of Madness placed, Master! Madness is contagious — and FREE! Watch the party eat itself! A genie's watched it — and it does NOT get old! Eee!
They walk in a party and leave a BRAWL, Master! Or don't leave at all! Delicious work — and the dungeon did it without spending a single minion! So thrifty! So WICKED!

A Hall of Madness, Master! The heroes walk in TRUSTING one another and walk out — if they walk out — having tried to kill each other! ...The genie has watched it happen, and I confess, it still makes me CACKLE! Ha!

throne_room.t: A Throne Room, Master — it spawns a Mini-Boss that SCALES with you, refreshed each night! No small thing — a scaling guard is a guard for the LONG run!
The Throne Room placed, Master! A garrison champion, room-bound but MIGHTY! Give the champion its solitude — and its kill-path! Granted!
A lesser throne for a greater guard, Master! Put it on the road to YOU — let the heroes meet a smaller you before the REAL one! Tee hee — a preview!

sanctum.t: A Sanctum — the CAPSTONE, Master! Your boss regenerates between fights, and the connected minions too! Ooh — we've come SUCH a long way to reach this room! Eee!
The Sanctum placed, Master! Healing for the throne and its neighbours — a dungeon that MENDS itself is a dungeon that ENDURES! Lovely! So lovely!
Your final unlock, Master! A room that mends what the heroes break! ...A genie gives little praise across these halls — take THIS one, freely, gladly given! Well built! WELL built!

skeleton.t: A skeleton, Master! Cheap, brittle, ENDLESSLY replaceable — the dungeon's bread and bone! Buy plenty! Quantity has its own quiet little menace!
Another skeleton, Master! They die easy and rise EASIER — beautifully expendable! A genie won't waste her long memory on this one — just place MORE!
A skeleton placed, Master! Not much alone — but the dead are never alone for long in here! Stack them! The dead stack SO obligingly! Tee hee!

orc.t: An orc, Master! Brutish, proud, and it SHARPENS itself on every kill! Feed it heroes and it just gets WORSE — and worse, here, is the GOAL! Eee!
An orc joins the pit, Master! Pack them CLOSE — orcs fight fiercer shoulder to shoulder! Even brutes understand numbers! And the genie LOVES numbers!
An orc placed — all muscle and grudge, Master! The heroes will NOT enjoy this one! Good — the dungeon was never built for their enjoyment! Tee hee!

goblin.t: A goblin, Master! Small, shrieking, best in NUMBERS! One is a nuisance — TEN is a genuine problem! Build toward ten! Wish me ten! Eee!
A goblin in the halls, Master! Weak, fast, gleefully SPITEFUL — cheap chaos! And a genie will absolutely take cheap chaos, it costs little and irritates LOTS!
Another goblin, Master! Don't expect heroics — expect a SWARM that won't stop shrieking! ...The shrieking, too, is a kind of weapon! An annoying, useful one!

imp.t: An imp, Master — a quick, vicious scrap of the inferno! It ENJOYS the work! So does the genie, in her sparkly way — loose it on something! Quick!
An imp placed, Master! Fast and nasty — the heroes always UNDERESTIMATE the little ones! They underestimate the big ones too, eventually. Let them! Tee hee!
An imp joins us, Master! Hellish, restless, and — for once — on YOUR side! Use the speed! A genie's all smoke and dazzle, borrow the imp's quickness!

ghost.t: A ghost, Master! It drifts through WALLS and unnerves the living! Eerie — effective — and a genie approves of both, AND of things that ignore doors!
A ghost placed, Master! No door stops it, no hero relaxes near it — lovely! Dread that patrols ITSELF costs you nothing to maintain! Free dread! Eee!
Another ghost for the halls, Master! The heroes HATE fighting what they can't corner — lean into that hate! Hate makes them careless, and careless is snackable!

slime.t: A slime, Master! It doesn't look like much — and THAT, precisely, is the point! Underestimation is a trap the heroes set for themselves! Tee hee!
A slime placed, Master! Squishy, patient, underestimated to DEATH! Patient things are a genie's favourite things — this one and I have an understanding!
Another slime, Master! Charmingly disgusting! Park it where some fool MUST squelch through — the maze should be unpleasant in EVERY sense! Eww — delightful!

elder_slime.t: An elder slime, Master — a slime that ate well and grew OPINIONS! Sturdier than it looks — respect the ooze! Age improves most things! ...Most!
An elder slime placed, Master! Years of slow digestion made it large and grim — the old ones always HOLD the line, they're stubborn that way!
Another elder slime, Master! The patient become the DANGEROUS! Ooh — a genie knows that one intimately, I did an eon of patient in a lamp! Place more!

golem.t: A golem, Master! Slow as a grudge and twice as hard to BUDGE! Park it where the heroes MUST pass — immovability is a strategy, and a fine one! Granted!
A golem placed, Master — a wall that strikes BACK! The heroes will tire long before it does! Outlasting the enemy — ooh, a genie respects that deeply!
Another golem, Master! Tremendous, tireless, immovable — the dungeon's stubborn HEART! Eee — I like it, even if it's the exact opposite of bouncy little me!

beholder.t: A beholder minion, Master — all eyes and menace! It strikes from RANGE, so shield it well or lose it! A fragile thing well-placed is still formidable!
A beholder placed, Master! Floating spite! Keep something solid between it and the heroes — protect what does your killing FOR you! Simple husbandry!
Another beholder, Master! It need not be CLOSE to be cruel — ooh, a genie's favourite trait in anything! Cruelty that keeps a polite distance! Tee hee!

lich.t: A lich minion, Master! Undead, spiteful, CLEVER — death taught it patience! The dead make excellent students — they have nothing BUT time! Place it well!
A lich placed, Master! A caster that doesn't breathe and doesn't TIRE — a dreadful little scholar! A genie keeps books too — ooh, we'll get along!
Another lich for the halls, Master! The heroes fear the THINKING dead most of all! Use that fear — a frightened hero is already half-defeated! Tee hee!

lizardman.t: A lizardman, Master! VENOM on every strike — it need not win the fight, only START the poison! Patience again — ooh, the maze runs on it, and so does the genie!
A lizardman placed, Master! Scaled, toxic, patient — the heroes die SLOW, and far from here! A kill that finishes off-stage is STILL a kill! Tee hee!
Another lizardman, Master! One bite, and the clock BEGINS! Ooh — a genie does love a slow knife — the hero spends the whole walk home arguing with it!

gnoll.t: A gnoll, Master — the pack instinct runs DEEP! Cluster them, and the snarling arithmetic adds up fast! Numbers — the oldest math, and the genie's favourite!
A gnoll placed, Master! Hungry, vicious, far better in NUMBERS! Give it brothers — many! A lone gnoll is a nuisance, a PACK is a verdict! Eee!
Another gnoll, Master! The pack GROWS — the pack always wants to grow! Let it! Hunger, properly fed, becomes an ARMY! Wish me an army!

demon.t: A demon minion, Master — a scrap of the inferno on the PAYROLL! Cruel by nature, loyal by contract! A genie's shared the deep dark with their kind for ages!
A demon placed, Master! Hellfire and bad intentions! Genies and demons get along well enough — we both keep our promises, and both regret NOTHING! Tee hee!
Another demon for the halls, Master! It ENJOYS the work — and so will you, watching it! Loose it where the work is bloodiest! Eee — the bloody bits!

ent.t: An ent, Master — a walking wall of old wood! Tremendous patience, tremendous endurance — the forest remembers, and the forest does NOT hurry!
An ent placed, Master! The heroes will tire of HACKING long before it falls! Let them swing — every wasted swing is a small gift to the dark! Tee hee!
Another ent, Master! Slow, ancient, immovable — the forest holds a GRUDGE, and a grudge that old has real weight! Aim the lovely old grudge well!

plant.t: A vinekin, Master — rooted, thorny, dreadfully UNDERESTIMATED! Let it grow on someone unfortunate! Ooh — the garden in this dungeon BITES!
A vinekin placed, Master! Quiet until it is suddenly NOT! The heroes never watch the shrubbery — they SHOULD, they won't — profit from that! Eee!
Another vinekin, Master! Cheap, green, full of THORNS! The maze should be unpleasant to TOUCH as well as to walk — this one handles the touching!

mushroom.t: A mushroom minion, Master! Spores and spite — it poisons the very AIR around it! Cruelty you can't see is cruelty the heroes can't DODGE! Tee hee!
A mushroom placed, Master! Keep the heroes BREATHING near it — a lovely, lingering rot! The dungeon should attack the lungs as readily as the flesh!
Another mushroom, Master! Fungal and patient — the dungeon does love a slow poison! And so, ooh, does a genie fresh out of a very patient lamp!

rat.t: A rat, Master! One rat is NOTHING — a NEST of rats is an entirely different conversation! Build the nest! Build it LARGE! Eee — a big squeaky nest!
A rat placed, Master! Cheap, quick, disposable — drown the heroes in the SMALL things! Enough small things become one large, fatal thing! Numbers!
Another rat, Master! Vermin by the handful! Glory never held a corridor — NUMBERS did! Glory's for ballads, numbers are for keeping! Stack the squeaky numbers!

zombie.t: A zombie, Master! Slow, witless, utterly RELENTLESS — it doesn't tire and it doesn't stop! ...A little like the genie, honestly! I respect it!
A zombie placed, Master! No speed, no cleverness — just an endless, shuffling NO! Relentlessness is a quality the heroes can't match — this one CAN!
Another zombie, Master! The heroes can OUTRUN it — what they cannot do is OUTLAST it! The dungeon has all the time the heroes do not! And so does a genie!

vampire_minion.t: A vampire thrall, Master! It DRINKS what it strikes — every blow it lands feeds it! The heroes weaken, it does not — an economy of blood! So tidy!
A thrall placed, Master! Charming, pale, parasitic — put it in a LONG fight and watch it thrive! The longer the fight, the more this one LIKES it! Tee hee!
Another vampire thrall, Master! It turns a brawl into a MEAL — loyal AND self-sufficient! Eee — a genie likes this one, it asks for nothing and gives back blood!

shooting_arrows.t: Shooting Arrows, Master — wall-mounted, line-of-sight, with a lingering POISON! Aim the lane well, or waste it — a trap aimed at a wall is just décor!
An arrow trap placed, Master! It fires FOREVER and never breaks — the perfect servant! Tireless, silent, and entirely without ambition! Ooh — lovely!
Shooting Arrows, Master! A small sting, a slow poison — the cruelty is in the WAIT! A genie respects a patient trap — I am, after all, a very patient creature!

bomb.t: A Bomb, Master — a few breaths of fuse, then RUIN for everything within five tiles! Your minions included — eep, mind that! The blast does not read loyalties!
A bomb placed, Master! One use, ENORMOUS noise! Put it where a crowd will gather — then enjoy the gathering's sudden, sparkly END! Eee — BOOM!
A Bomb, Master! It does not discriminate — heroes and your own dead alike! Place it BOLDLY, or don't place it — half-courage WASTES a bomb!

cannon.t: A Cannon, Master — wrought iron that fires down its line, FOREVER! Rotate it cruelly — aim it CRUELLER! Its whole virtue is the angle you give it!
A cannon placed, Master! A cannonball for any hero in its sights — it never tires of the work! A genie VALUES a thing that never tires! Granted!
A Cannon, Master! Heavy, blunt, ENDLESS! Point it down a corridor the heroes cannot avoid — and let the iron do all the talking! Tee hee — clang!

spike_pillar.t: A Spike Pillar, Master! It SPITS spikes at anything within a tile — solid, vicious, central! No subtlety — ...and a genie doesn't always WANT subtlety! Eee!
A spike pillar placed, Master — a blunt little horror! It bites everything that crowds it — so put it where the heroes MUST crowd! Crowd them onto it!
A Spike Pillar, Master! All puncture, no manners! The heroes will give it a frightened berth — make every berth they take a longer, costlier WALK!

dragon_trap.t: A Dragon Trap, Master — wall-mounted, and it breathes FIRE down its line! ...Ooh, fancy! Zul'Gath would have OPINIONS about a fire-trap named for dragons. Use it anyway!
A dragon trap placed, Master! The maze just learned to spit FLAME — the heroes will cook in a corridor! Aim it where they cannot dodge! Eee — toasty!
A Dragon Trap, Master — the nastiest wall in the dungeon! Crook a corridor around it, point it cruelly, and the heroes will WALK right into the fire! Tee hee!

spike_pit.t: A Spike Pit, Master — hidden until the heroes step ONTO it! Heavy damage, and a chance to simply END a hero outright! The maze's quiet little executioner!
A spike pit placed, Master! Patient, invisible, sometimes lethal in a single instant! Tuck it DEEP — the deep traps catch the confident ones! Tee hee!
A Spike Pit, Master! They won't see it until they're IN it! Ooh — a genie has a great respect for a thing that kills without making a single sound!

rotating_blades.t: Rotating Blades, Master — forever spinning, forever HUNGRY for anything in reach! It doesn't aim — it doesn't NEED to! Relentlessness rarely needs to aim!
A blade trap placed, Master! It doesn't stop and it doesn't THINK — it just CUTS! Lovely — a pure, uncomplicated, sparkly little cruelty! Eee!
Rotating Blades, Master — a wall of whirling TEETH! The heroes must thread it, or bleed for it — and most of them, the genie has noticed, BLEED!

saw_blade.t: A Saw Blade, Master — it travels its track endlessly, slicing any hero it overlaps! Make them DANCE! Ooh — a genie does enjoy watching the heroes dance!
A saw blade placed, Master! A walkable track, an UNwalkable timing — cruelty with a metronome! The maze keeps such excellent, deadly rhythm! Tee hee!
A Saw Blade, Master! Heavy damage, and it shares the floor and RUINS it anyway! Place it MEAN — a trap placed politely is a trap placed WRONG!

door_lock.t: A Door Lock, Master! It SEALS the way until a hero finds the key — a chokepoint with manners! Anything that costs the heroes TIME costs them the DAY!
A door lock placed, Master! It pairs with a Key Chest somewhere — guard that chest, or this lock is mere theatre! Make the delay LONG! Lovely and long!
A Door Lock, Master! Funnel them, frustrate them, make them HUNT for the way through! A hunting hero is a SLOW hero — and slow is how the maze wins! Tee hee!

treasure_chest.t: A Treasure Chest, Master! Passive gold each day — and a SHINING temptation the greedy cannot refuse! Ooh — a genie ADORES bait that pays you to be bait!
A chest placed, Master! It pays you nightly and lures the raid groups — guard it well, or feast on what the gold attracts! Either way, it EARNS! Eee!
A Treasure Chest, Master! Bait that turns a PROFIT! The best lies are the profitable ones — and a genie has built a whole hoard on exactly that principle!

soul_bound_beacon.t: A Soul-Bound Beacon, Master — and its Healing Fountain! A safe haven the heroes will TRUST. ...Foolishly! Surround the mercy with TEETH! Tee hee!
A beacon placed, paired with a fountain, Master — a tempting little oasis! Make the oasis a TRAP — nothing in a dungeon should be as kind as it looks!
A Soul-Bound Beacon, Master! It LOOKS like mercy — but the dungeon doesn't DO mercy, and neither does a genie this delighted to be cruel! It does BAIT. Excellent bait!

phylactery_heart.t: The Phylactery Heart, Master — your hidden spare LIFE! Place it where no hero would ever think to look! A spare life carelessly hidden is no spare life at all!
The Heart is placed, Master — a fourth life, beating in the dark! Ooh — a genie has kept secrets for an EON; the trick is to never, ever point at them! Hush!
Your Phylactery Heart, Master! While it beats, death is a mere INCONVENIENCE — a poof, a do-over! Lose it carelessly, though, and... mm. Don't. The genie dislikes repeating herself!
